course_description: Profile Mathematics (Grades 10-11) is a complete adaptive course for unified state exam preparation and strong algebra-geometry fluency. The course graph connects foundational arithmetic, equations, functions, geometry, probability, and applied modeling through explicit prerequisite dependencies. Each node combines theory, worked examples, and targeted practice so the learner sees both the method and the exam-style execution pattern. Entrance and practice assessments update the learner state and reveal the next frontier of topics that should be mastered first. The goal is consistent progress from core operations to advanced mixed problems with transparent mastery tracking on every graph node.
